commentary_text: The model favors Iran at 48% while the market favors Egypt at 38–39%, a 16–point gap on the Egypt win probability. This inversion could reflect recent lineup changes, injury news, or current form information unavailable to the statistical model since its last update. The market also prices the draw notably higher than the model does, suggesting belief in a closer, more competitive match than the Elo-based forecast implies. The dashboard flags this as a meaningful structural disagreement rather than a resolution of which view will prove correct.
